title: 目標達成の後に・最終決戦へ

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Feeding off the infinite wave of feels that was my
run of senior-year spring G1 races, I have
achieved a super evolution. It's time to take on
Opera O and Doto!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I wanna race them at a course where they can be
at the top of their game! That means our only
choice is to run a medium-distance race on turf!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Next up is the autumn Tenno Sho! Bring it on.
